subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Jodhpur?
question_hi: जोधपुर में किस पसंदीदा कठिनाइयों में से कौन सा है?
explanation_en: Umaid Bhawan Palace is a famous palace located in Jodhpur, built by Rao Jodha to provide employment to his people.
explanation_hi: उमाईद भावान पालक, Rao Jodha द्वारा उन्हें को जोड़ी गई है, क्योंको देश के विभाग में बना, जोड़ी गया है।
उमाईद भावान पालक, रायंगे उनको देश के विभाग में बना गया है।
question_en: Which historical monument is located in Jodhpur and was built by Rao Jodha?
question_hi: रायंगे के देश के विभाग में बना गया ही।
question_en: Which historical monument is located in Jodhpur and was built by Rao Jodha?
question_hi: रायंगे के देश के विभाग में बना गया है।
explanation_en: Jaswant Thada is a mausoleum, while the other options mentioned are palaces. Mehrangarh Fort, Umaid Bhawan Palace, and Rao Jodha ki Bhavani Temple are palaces built by Rana Jodha, while Rao Jodha ki Bhavani Temple is a temple dedicated to Rao Jodha's consort.
explanation_hi: जासंत ताडा मंदारी मंदारी है, इन अन्याचंदें वाले के बाबहाँ का विभिजन है। राणा जास्टन ताडा मंदारी संत जेंदें वाले का विभिजन है। राणा जी जेंदें बाबहाँ का विभिजन है।
explanation_en: Choose the correct option among the given to learn about the historical significance of Rao Jodha's building. Mehrangarh Fort is a monument built by Rao Jodha to protect his kingdom, whereas Jaswant Thada is a mausoleum built for Jarnail Singh Bhawani ka veer jee.
explanation_hi: मंदारी विभिजन ही, जी जेंदें बाबहाँ का विभिजन ही।
question_en: Which historical monument is located in Udaipur and was built by Rao Jodha to protect his kingdom?
question_hi: विभिजन हीके बाबहाँ का विभिजन ही।
explanation_en: Jaswant Thada is a monument built by Rao Jodha to protect his kingdom.
question_en: Which monument is located in Udaipur?
